# nullcloud_subnet (Data Source)

Fetches a NullCloud Subnet by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nullcloud_subnet" "example" {
  id = "subnet-abc123"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the subnet.

### Read-Only

- `cidr_block` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `crn` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `vpc_id` (String)
- `zone` (String)
